EmailTemplate.name: Loan Apply
EmailTemplate.subject: Loan Application Documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Sir/Madam,
This is to inform you that applicant {!Loan__c.RW_Booking__r.Primary_Applicant_Name__c} has shown interest to apply for the Home Loan from the Bank {!Loan__c.RW_Bank_Name__c}. Below are the details attached.
Thanks, Runwal Team
